headline: Mint Innovation Achieves Industry-First Closed Loop Recycled Copper Production in Collaboration with HP
summary: Certification validates Mint’s world-first metal recovery technology capable of returning traceable, certified copper from electronic waste for reuse in new products.SYDNEY, March 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Mint Innovation, an e-waste technology company, today announced it has successfully produced the industry’s first batch of certified closed loop recycled copper through an industry-first collaboration with HP Inc.
